Game.Name: Super Valis - Akaki Tsuki no Otome (Japan)
Game.plot: Super Valis IV is an Action game, developed and published by Laser Soft,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: CodesAt the "Press Start" title screen, press: Up, Down, Left, Right 3 times, Select, Select, Y, B and Start. If done right, the stage select menu will appear. Now, while playing if you press Select you'll be able to skip stages. Also, if you pause the game and then press Select, you'll be able to listen to the game's music.
